name: rich_day
description: A busy day: 6+ meetings with externals, 20+ emails (2 need reply, 1 muted-sender newsletter, 1 promo newsletter), iMessage/WhatsApp threads (unanswered ask + a group chat), an open continuity loop that SHOULD resolve (reply landed on another channel) and one that should surface, a birthday, and a calendar action with an event link. Critic must RUN on this brief.

frontmatter.summary: Dana asked for the redlined partnership agreement
Marcus is waiting on the pricing model for the pilot

stub_response.brief_markdown:
# Your morning brief

## Needs attention now
- **Nadia Cross** sent the Series B wire instructions and needs your sign-off.
- **Ivy Park** left board-deck feedback that needs a reply before the board meeting.

## Should handle today
- **Ravi Menon** is waiting on WhatsApp about the pilot kickoff date.
- **Jake Rosen** asked (iMessage) if you're still on for coffee Thursday.
- Call **Priya Anand** back.

## Coming up
- Acme <> Sotto Partnership at 10 (Dana Wells).

## Already handled
- You answered Dana Wells on iMessage about the partnership agreement.

facts.fact: Driving the Sotto partnership to close this quarter

events.description: Walk through the redlined partnership agreement and pilot scope.

emails.subject: Series B wire instructions
emails.snippet: Need your sign-off before the bank cutoff at noon.
emails.body: Hi — the wire instructions for the Series B close are attached. I need your explicit sign-off before the bank cutoff at noon today, otherwise we slip to Monday. Can you confirm the account details and reply-all so legal has it on record?

emails.subject: Re: Board deck feedback
emails.snippet: A few comments on slides 4-7 before the board meeting.
emails.body: Went through the deck — strong overall. A few comments on slides 4-7 (the retention cohort chart needs a denominator, and the ARR bridge double-counts the pilot). Can you turn these before the board meeting? Happy to hop on a quick call.

emails.subject: Your Morning Newsletter: 10 startups to watch
emails.snippet: The hottest startups this week plus a sponsored deal.
emails.body: Good morning! Here are the 10 startups everyone is watching this week. Sponsored: get 40% off our premium tier.

emails.subject: FLASH SALE ends tonight
emails.body: Our biggest flash sale of the year ends tonight at midnight.

emails.subject: Redlines attached
emails.snippet: Dana asked me to send the redlined agreement.
emails.body: Attaching the redlined partnership agreement Dana mentioned. Let us know if the indemnity clause works on your end.

emails.subject: Sync later today
emails.snippet: Looking forward to the investor sync.
emails.body: See you at the sync later. I'd love an update on the enterprise pipeline and the two logos you mentioned last time.

emails.subject: Design review agenda
emails.body: For the design review: new onboarding flow, the settings redesign, and the dark-mode audit. Figma link inside.

emails.subject: [sotto/app] PR #482 merged
emails.body: PR #482 (fix: continuity ledger race) was merged into main.

emails.subject: Reminder: Board Meeting Q3
emails.body: This is a reminder for Board Meeting Q3.

emails.subject: Invoice for March
emails.body: Attaching my March invoice — 62 hours on the design system. Net-30 as usual.

emails.subject: Standup notes
emails.body: Standup notes: backend on track, the Bridge reconnection bug is fixed, QA starts Thursday.

emails.subject: Your March bill
emails.body: Your AWS bill for March is now available.

emails.subject: Weekly digest
emails.body: Here is what happened in your workspace this week.

emails.subject: Sr. Backend Engineer intro
emails.body: I have two strong senior backend candidates who'd be a great fit. Want intros?

emails.subject: Receipt from Sotto Inc
emails.body: You received a payment of $12,400 from Beta Labs.

emails.subject: Contract renewal
emails.body: A heads up that your annual plan renews next month. No action needed unless you want to change tiers.

emails.subject: How was your week?
emails.body: We'd love a quick rating of your week in Slack.

emails.subject: Intro to your new counsel
emails.body: Introducing Ana, who will be your lead counsel for the Acme deal. Copying her here.

emails.subject: You have 3 new messages
emails.body: You have 3 new messages waiting on LinkedIn.

emails.subject: Following up on our chat
emails.snippet: Great to connect at the conference.
emails.body: Great to connect at the conference. Would love to explore whether Sotto could work for our ops team. Free next week?

emails.subject: Kenji shared a folder with you
emails.body: Kenji Watanabe shared 'Design System Assets' with you.

emails.subject: FYI: legal thread
emails.body: Forwarding the legal thread so you have context for the wire sign-off above.

meetings.title: Acme partnership kickoff
meetings.ai_summary: Agreed on pilot scope; Dana to send redlines, you to send pricing.

imessage.text: Still on for coffee Thursday? Would love your read on the pitch.
Dana — redlines look good, sending the pricing model over now.
I can take 4 people in the van.

whatsapp.text: Hey! What date works for the pilot kickoff on your side?
